response.justification: The candidate presents a compelling, though not perfect, profile. His extensive experience with the D programming language in high-performance, low-latency environments is a strong proxy for the required C++/Rust skills. This, combined with his direct experience founding and developing a geospatial data platform (GISCollective), aligns well with the core responsibilities of the role. While his professional C++ experience is dated, his demonstrated ability to work across the stack and deep dive into systems-level languages suggests he could quickly become productive in a modern C++ environment.
strengths: Direct experience developing a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience building low-latency, high-throughput systems with Dlang, a C-family language.
Broad technical background and demonstrated ability to learn and work across different technology stacks.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with C++ or Rust; C++ experience is from 2015.
Recent roles have heavily focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than systems programming.
Deep investment in the Dlang ecosystem might indicate a preference against working primarily in C++.
